acceptance_criteria: Mapped blocked route returns deterministic gate and reason list for stable fixture inputs
quality_guards: Integration test reuses shared driver_flow_harness and manifest route helpers
Blocked envelope assertions verify gate/reason/process exit fields with no hidden side effects

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind integration --tests-passed pass --live-check-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity na --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
